description: The Student Academic Performance Dataset is a synthetic educational dataset designed to analyze and predict student outcomes based on academic, demographic, and behavioral factors. It contains records of 5,000 students with attributes such as age, gender, class level, study hours per day, attendance percentage, parental education, internet access, and participation in extracurricular activities. Academic performance is measured through subject-wise scores in Mathematics, Science, and English, along with a calculated final percentage, performance level, and pass/fail status.

recordsets.recordset_description: This dataset is well-suited for exploratory data analysis (EDA), machine learning classification, and regression tasks. It can be used to study the impact of study habits and attendance on academic success, predict student performance levels, and build pass/fail prediction models. The data is clean, structured, and fully anonymized, making it ideal for students, educators, and data science practitioners working on educational analytics projects.
